title: Corry Bentley
compiled_truth: Corry Bentley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-28 to 2002-02-28), Corry Bentley sent 28 and received 623 emails, totalling 651 interactions. Top correspondents: [Cara Semperger](people/cara-semperger) (12), [Lloyd Will](people/lloyd-will) (9), [Debra Bailey](people/debra-bailey) (8), [David Poston](people/david-poston) (8), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (8).
